dealSummary: Cognition, an AI startup specializing in a programming agent for software development, raised over $1 billion in a round led by Lux Capital, General Catalyst and 8VC at a $26 billion valuation.
AI inference startup Fireworks AI is in talks to raise a new round led by Index Ventures at a $15 billion valuation, Bloomberg reported.
Capchase, the developer of a financing platform for enterprise technology companies, secured over $200 million in a mix of equity and debt warehouse facilities.
Fusion energy startup Thea Energy raised a $100 million Series B from investors including US Innovative Technology Fund, General Innovation Capital Partners and Linse Capital.
leadInvestors: US Innovative Technology Fund, General Innovation Capital Partners, Linse Capital

dealSummary: Italian travel tech startup WeRoad raised a $58 million Series C led by Airbnb.
ClearNote Health, which develops tools for early cancer detection, received a $52 million Series D led by Mattias Westman.
Pace, a startup developing AI agents for insurance workflows, raised a $46 million Series B led by Thrive Capital and Sequoia.
NavigateAI, the developer of a physical AI copilot for construction field workers, secured a $25 million seed round led by Elad Gil.
LightTable raised a $22 million Series A led by Innovation Endeavors.

company: LightTable develops an AI design and construction platform. AI inference optimization startup Tensormesh
dealSummary: LightTable develops an AI design and construction platform. AI inference optimization startup Tensormesh secured a $20 million round from investors including AMD Ventures, CoreWeave and NVentures.
D-CRBN, a Belgian startup focusing on carbon-dioxide recycling for industrials, raised a €17.5 million Series A led by Astaia.
London-based cybersecurity specialist RevEng. AI received a $15 million Series A led by NATO Innovation Fund.
